summary: Backend-only testing for 'The Grind Station'. Created /app/backend/tests/test_grindstation.py with 30 pytest tests covering health, auth (register/login/me/logout, bearer + cookie), plans (seed + admin update + RBAC), mocked subscribe (final amount = price*(1-discount/100), prior membership deactivation, invalid method validation), dashboard, classes (seed + book + duplicate + cancel + membership-gated), recovery (limit=2 enforcement + membership-gated + reset), admin RBAC across 5 endpoints, analytics shape, and contact. All 30/30 tests PASS against the live preview URL.

minor.issue: Endpoint relies on get_current_user is NOT required; logout works without auth. Acceptable but worth noting — it just clears cookies regardless.
Signature has an unused `user: Optional[dict] = None` parameter that is never injected via Depends. Cosmetic/dead code; no functional impact.
No brute-force lockout implemented (playbook recommends lockout after 5 failed logins). Not in problem spec; flagging per playbook.

set_auth_cookies uses secure=False and samesite='lax'. For production cross-site (preview domain) this works but cookies won't be sent on true cross-site contexts; frontend mitigates by also using Bearer token. OK for MVP.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~605 lines — borderline but acceptable; consider splitting into routers (auth, plans, classes, recovery, admin) for maintainability as feature set grows.
Subscription endpoint stores card_last4/upi_id in request model but does not persist them — model fields are effectively unused. Either persist (masked) for invoice display or remove fields.
Membership expiry computed using fixed 30 days per month — minor inaccuracy; consider relativedelta for true calendar months.
verify_password swallows all exceptions and returns False — acceptable but logs would help debugging bad hashes.
JWT_SECRET committed to .env (sample value); ensure rotated for production. Not a runtime bug.
No rate limiting on /api/auth/login — brute-force vulnerability per auth playbook.
test_credentials: admin@grindstation.com / Admin@Grind2026 ; member@grindstation.com / Member@Grind2026 (both verified working)
seed_data_creation: Tests register dynamic users using @example.com (note: pydantic EmailStr blocks .test/.local TLDs as special-use; initial attempts with @grind.test returned 422 — switched to @example.com). Admin reset of recovery used between recovery tests for isolation.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 30 backend tests pass at https://gym-membership-hub-24.preview.emergentagent.com. Use @example.com (NOT .test/.local) in any new EmailStr payloads — pydantic v2 EmailStr blocks special-use TLDs. Seed runs in lifespan startup; admin/member auto-created. Mocked subscribe always succeeds for valid payment_method ∈ {upi, debit_card, credit_card}. Tests use Bearer auth; cookie path also verified via test_me_with_cookie.
